title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
description: The document outlines the implementation and accreditation process of the EU Farm Advisory System in the Czech Republic, detailing how advisors are trained, accredited, and supported to provide environmental and cross-compliance advice under the Common Agricultural Policy. It highlights financial mechanisms, key advisory topics such as nitrate management and organic farming, and quality assurance measures through ongoing training.
